title: School and college voice: omnibus surveys for 2024 to 2025
body: "The school and college voice is a regular online survey. It gathers views within the academic year from senior leaders and classroom teachers in state-funded primary, secondary and special schools, and in colleges.  The survey covers a wide range of topics related to the Department for Education’s (DfE) aims, priorities and policies. The topics include:   staff wellbeing pupil behaviour staff absence teacher training recruitment and retention pupil safeguarding special educational needs and disability (SEND) curriculum design   More detail on the methodology is available in ‘School and college voice technical report: 2024 to 2025 academic year’.  The zip file contains the survey data tables.  School and college panel: omnibus surveys for 2023 to 2024 reports are also available. Find other omnibus survey reports in the Omnibus surveys collection.  "
